nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values: Photorealistic beautiful young woman with long straight brown hair, tan glowing skin, sharp eyebrows, full glossy lips, wearing a fitted white ribbed sleeveless tank top and light blue jeans, sitting on a modern chair in a minimalist concrete studio. She looks directly at the camera with a confident smile.the girl smiles at the camera and she speaks directly in a confident, lipsync “Buy AI Verse membership! Go to the link in the description!” She smoothly stands up from the chair as the camera slowly zooms out to reveal her full body from head to toe. Once fully standing, she flicks her long hair back over her shoulder with her right hand, lets it fall naturally,
